title: elaphoglossum stenopteris
intro: Elaphoglossum stenopteris is a species of fern, specifically a type of epiphytic or lithophytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome and arthritis. Elaphoglossum stenopteris can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in some traditional remedies as a compress or poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
